details.test: Task 1: Android habit app with calendar view and Google Play link
Task 2: Cheapest monthly 3+ devices plan to checkout
Task 3: FAQ cancel iOS within 7 days and open refund contact
Task 4: Cheapest cross-platform app under $10 with free trial and start trial
Task 5: Newest iOS NoteMaster sync tutorial and copy link
Task 6: Newsletter subscription weekly, Canada, Product Updates + Security Alerts
Task 7: High-priority billing support ticket for TaskFlow Android
Task 8: Compare two cheapest offline + cloud sync apps under $8/month
Task 9: Switch to EUR and start purchase flow for cheapest iOS app
